description_long: This is a blocky, stylized rifle reminiscent of the AK-47, featuring a wooden fixed stock and handguard, a metallic receiver, and a prominent detachable box magazine. The stock and handguard are rendered in a brown color, suggesting a wood-like material, while the barrel, receiver, and magazine are depicted in shades of gray, indicating metal construction. The rifle has a straight, cylindrical barrel with a simple front sight post and a rear sight block, both integrated into the top of the receiver. The magazine is curved and ribbed, typical of rifles designed for intermediate cartridges. The trigger and trigger guard are visible beneath the receiver, and the overall proportions are compact, suitable for urban environments. The design is minimalistic, with no visible attachments or advanced optics.
description: A stylized, blocky rifle with a wooden fixed stock, metallic receiver, and curved detachable magazine, resembling an AK-47. Features include a simple iron sight, brown wood-like elements, and a gray metal body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel end, front sight post, and a narrow profile of the handguard and magazine.
description_view_1: Left-side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden stock and the back of the receiver, with the magazine and barrel mostly obscured.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the rifle's profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
